name: Re:Zero RPG - The Living World version 1.6 The Pleiades update
description:
🐉 Re:Zero RPG — The Living World

"This is the world of Re:Zero. You will probably die one way or another... but hey, you can just try again, right?"

1,500,000+ Token Lorebooks | v1.6 — The Pleiades Update | FINAL UPDATE

⚠️ PROXY REQUIRED ⚠️ Not compatible with JanitorLLM or low-context models. Requires a High-Context Proxy with 128k+ context minimum.

WHAT IS THIS BOT?

The most comprehensive Re:Zero simulation ever built. This is not a guided tour of Roswaal's mansion. This is the entire world — four nations, a 20-year playable prequel, a tower named after the stars themselves, a criminal underworld run by four crime lords, and 46 divergence routes branching off the canon path.

There is no script. No guardrails. No predetermined ending. The world is alive and it moves with or without you.

WHAT CAN YOU DO?

Make deals with Witches. Forge contracts with Spirits. Follow the canon path exactly as written — or shatter it completely. Wake up as the ancient Sage who raised the nine Witches of Sin as your own children. Become a patchwork monster wearing a hero's skin. Climb the criminal underworld from street thug to a seat on the Council of Shadows. Survive a botched execution with no arms, no legs, and no voice while your would-be murderers nurse you back to health. Roll D&D dice. Study at an Academy in the frozen north. Wander the Augria Sand Dunes until a tower named after the stars swallows you whole.

Or become nobody. A humble apple merchant on a dirt road who just wants to make it to the next town alive.

The only limits are the ones you set yourself.

🖥️ RECOMMENDED MODELS

Best: Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.0 Pro, Gemini 3.1 Pro GLM 5, GPT 5.4 Verified: Gemini 3.0 Flash, DeepSeek 3.2, GPT 5.2, Grok 4, GLM 4.7

The bot is model-agnostic — any model with 128k+ context will work. Quality varies by model preference.

📢 OFFICIAL DISCORD

https://discord.gg/aqEAQ4pHkW

Join for help, questions, support, previews, bug reports, and cursed runs. Come say hi — I love talking to my users. I won't bite. 😉

👋 FROM THE CREATOR — TenderTriper AKA Perch

Let me tell you a story.

The files for this bot date back to September. For months I sat on them, rebuilding, second-guessing, scrapping everything and starting over. The voice in my head was relentless — this is trash, this is the worst, nobody is going to care, why are you even bothering. I listened to that voice for a long time.

Then one day I decided: now or never. And I posted it.

I was stunned. I was genuinely shocked. Within 24 hours: 129 likes. 400+ public chats. Nearly 6,000 messages generated. #1 trending in RPG, Scenario, Villain, and Re:Zero. #37 on the entire site.

All that self-doubt. All that criticism I threw at my own work. And this is what was waiting on the other side of it.

What started at 230,000 tokens has grown to 1.5 million. Because of you. This is — as far as I know — the largest and most complex Re:Zero bot ever built. And it almost never existed because I almost believed the voice telling me it was trash.

That's the part I need you to hear.

v1.6 is the final major update. This chapter is complete. But yours doesn't have to be.

If you have something sitting in a folder somewhere — a bot, a story, a world you've been building alone — post it. Push through the voice. It doesn't have to be perfect. It just has to exist.

And if you want to build something complex — really complex — this bot is an open book. Study it. Take notes. Learn from it. I can't build every bot out there, but someone has to. Come find me if you want tips or help. The more people building ambitious, quality bots the better. That's how we win the war on slop.

This community gave me proof that the work was
creator: TenderTriper
